channel.title: Porkbun on Jordan Herzstein
channel.description: Recent content in Porkbun on Jordan Herzstein

item.title: Quick thoughts on the Neocities Outage
item.description: I was not expecting to be ahead of the curve on Namecheap.

item.title: New email/website domain!
item.description: Friendship with .xyz has ended, .com is my new best friend. Friendship with namecheap has ended, porkbun is my new best friend
